title: Instagram Ends Encrypted DMs | Meta Reversal May 2026
subtitle: Meta removes optional end-to-end encryption from Instagram DMs on May 8, 2026. Affected users must download their encrypted chats before access disappears.
content_html:
Meta is removing optional end-to-end encryption from Instagram direct messages on May 8, 2026. The change affects users who opted into E2EE when it was rolled out in 2023.

What Is Changing

Instagram DMs will no longer be encrypted end-to-end by default or by option after May 8. Meta says fewer than 1 percent of users enabled the feature. Users should download their encrypted chat history before the cutoff.

How to Export Your Chats

Go to Settings, then Privacy, then Download Your Data and request a copy of your messages before the deadline.

metadata.title: Instagram Ends Encrypted DMs | Meta Reversal May 2026
metadata.description: Meta ends end-to-end encryption for Instagram direct messages on May 8, 2026. What changed, who is affected, and what users should do before the cutoff.
